title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LUBUAGAN HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUBUAGAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO KALINGA HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 8724 / 61 OG No. 4, 364 (January 25, 1965)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4044, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LUBUAGAN HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUBUAGAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO KALINGA HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Lubuagan Hospital in the Municipality of Lubuagan, Mountain Province, is hereby changed to Kalinga Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
